name: Primavera Salad with Warm Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 medium Cucumber; peeled -- seeded and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook tortellini in a large pot of rapidly boiling salted water for about 25 minutes, or until tender, stirring occasionally. Drain.
2. Blanch snow peas in a large pot of boiling water for 1 minute, then chill in an ice bath until cold.
3. Blanch carrots and asparagus in the boiling water, then chill in an ice bath until cold.
4. In a large bowl, combine pasta, all vegetables, and cheese.
5. In a small skillet over medium heat, combine olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, basil, pepper, Tabasco, and salt. Heat until warm. Pour over pasta mixture; sprinkle with parsley and toss until well blended.
6. Yield: 4 to 6 servings.
